title: Assign and automate tasks to sub-teams as well!
excerpt:
Hello. 
I would like to be able to assign tasks to sub-teams to manage tasks in a team within a project. 
Also, I would like to be able to target not only teams but also sub-teams for automation. 
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: monomono (Moe Nomura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.
I would like to be able to assign tasks to sub-teams to manage tasks in a team within a project.
Also, I would like to be able to target not only teams but also sub-teams for automation.
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: krasten (Kristen Harris)
posts.cookedHtml: Just played around with this a little more. Looks like it is possible to assign sub-teams as owners of a task as well as use them in automations. You just have to make sure the sub-team is invited as a board member. Hope this helps!
